meta.name: Mona et ses voix
meta.description: As she celebrates her 40th birthday, Mona finds herself lost amid the voices crowding her head: the voice of society, the voice of the media, the voice of reason, the voice of the young girl she once was... A whimsical and feminist musical, *Mona and Her Voices* chronicles 24 hours in the life of a woman out of tune who is struggling to find her voice back.
